name: Spicy Molasses Cookies
recipeInstructions:
1. Cream together shortening and sugar until light and fluffy.
2. Add eggs; beat well.
3. Beat in molasses and lemon extract.
4. Sift together flour, cinnamon, ginger, salt, baking powder, and baking soda.
5. Add to creamed mixture with vinegar; mix well.
6. Roll dough out on a floured surface to 1/8 inch thick.
7. Cut with floured 2-inch cookie cutter.
8. Place cookies about 1 1/2 inches apart on greased baking sheets.
9. Bake in a 350°F oven for 6 to 8 minutes, or until brown.
10. Remove from baking sheets; cool on racks.
